title: Saliva test plus AI could flag chemotherapy risk, early study results suggest
summary: Early results from a new study suggest that a simple saliva test and powerful artificial intelligence algorithms could help doctors identify cancer patients at high risk for severe side effects from a widely used chemotherapy drug.

title: New zinc-air battery's discharge breaks down toxic dyes in wastewater
summary: Researchers at IISc in India have reengineered the zinc-air battery so that produces only hydrogen peroxide during discharging process.

title: Screen time could help, not harm, brain health in old age
summary: A new study showed that digital technology use was associated with a 58% lower risk of cognitive impairment and 26% slower rates of cognitive decline over time among older adults.

title: New Enzyme Target Shows Promise to Stop Glioblastoma Growth
summary: Researchers have identified a novel therapeutic approach to fight glioblastoma, the most lethal form of brain cancer.

title: Study finds protein partnership protects chromosomes
summary: A new study from Weill Cornell Medicine provides insights into how cells maintain the tiny end caps of chromosomes as they divide, a key process in keeping cells healthy.
